events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the video/document comparison shows final fastening/joining was performed before the alignment/dimensional verification step required by the standard work sheet — a stop-work sequence violation. Decision is `fail` (high risk, installed-defective/non-compliant), with corrective actions to quarantine the assembly, retroactively verify fit/alignment, re-sequence per the standard work sheet, and retrain via TWI Job Instruction.
